notes.use_for_a17: proof quality can be structural and continuous, not only binary hit/miss
notes.mapping: route chains and accepted proof context can be graded as chain-like evidence

notes.use_for_a17: graph structures/cycles are native proof objects; memory and random access matter
notes.mapping: HRain graph can become a route ecology map rather than a passive event drawing

notes.use_for_a17: expensive generation, cheap verification, binding to prevent loose reuse
notes.mapping: A17 exports hypotheses and bias only when route purity/binding are high
